implementationNotes:
Draft PR #18 created — awaiting Terraform plan

Draft PR #18 created — awaiting Terraform plan

items.label: Infrastructure Written — Terraform
items.docNote: Terraform validated successfully. Infrastructure for user-profile feature: (1) OpenAPI spec api-sample.openapi.yaml updated with /profile path — GET (operationId: getProfile) returns UserProfile (id uuid, displayName, email, theme enum light|dark|system) with 200/401 responses; PATCH (operationId: updateProfile) accepts ProfileUpdate body (displayName min2/max50, theme enum) with 200/400/401 responses. (2) No new Terraform resources needed — APIM api-sample resource picks up new operations from the OpenAPI import. (3) Existing dual-mode auth policies (demo: check-header X-Demo-Token; entra: validate-jwt) already include PATCH in allowed-methods and X-Demo-Token + Content-Type in allowed-headers. (4) terraform plan: 0 to add, 0 to destroy. Redevelopment note: previous poll-app-ci failure was not infra-related (empty run ID / unknown domain).

items.label: Development Complete — Backend
items.docNote: Added fn-profile.ts Azure Function at /api/profile with GET (hardcoded mock profile) and PATCH (Zod-validated merge). Auth via X-Demo-Token header with constant-time comparison. No schema drift — schemas/OpenAPI/barrel exports were pre-created by infra-dev.

items.label: Development Complete — Frontend
items.docNote: Added /profile page with authenticated form (displayName + theme select), NavBar Profile link in NavBarShell, 4 unit tests (loading/success/error/disabled states), and 3 E2E tests (happy path, 400 error intercept, nav link visibility).
